generalRules: Members of federally recognized American Indian or Alaska Native tribes are generally eligible.
Some non-Indian individuals may receive care under specific circumstances at certain facilities.
Tribal-specific rules at tribally operated facilities vary; this card is generic IHS direct-care eligibility.
acceptedDocumentation: Tribal enrollment card or letter from a federally recognized tribe
Certificate of Degree of Indian or Alaska Native Blood (CDIB)
Other proof of descent from a federally recognized tribe member
